help.apprun3:
apprun3 - AppRun Format 3 runner and utility

Usage:
    apprun3 [--flags] <apprunx> [app args...]

Without flags, runs the bundle. With flags, performs the selected action and exits.

Information:
    --id                        Print bundle ID
    --is-format3                Print whether this is Format 3 (true/false)
    --info                      Print all metadata
    --info=key1,key2,...        Print selected keys
    --box-path                  Print Box directory path

Prepare and register:
    --prepare                   Prepare runtime environment (mount, venv, dependencies)
    --register                  Run --prepare and register a .desktop file
    --portable[=mount,box]      Create Box and/or mount point next to the .apprunx
                                under <id>.apprunx.data.d
                                Defaults to mount,box when value is omitted
    --inherit[=venv,data,full]  Copy existing ~/.local/apprun/boxes/<id> contents
                                into the portable Box
                                Defaults to full when value is omitted

File extraction:
    --extract-file-from=<inner-path> --extract-file-to=<destination>
                                Extract a file from the bundle
                                (both options are required together)

Service management:
    --install-services          Copy bundled services/*.service into
                                /usr/share/services.apprd/system and link into
                                /etc/systemd/system/
                                --enable: enable after install
                                --start : start after install (also enables)

    --uninstall-services        Stop, disable, and remove bundled system services

    --install-as-service=<type>,<after>,<before>
                                Generate and install a systemd service
                                  type  : required; simple, oneshot, forking, notify, idle
                                  after : optional After= units (+ separated)
                                  before: optional Before= units (+ separated)

    --install-as-global-user-service[=<type>,<after>,<before>]
                                Install as a global user service
                                  type defaults to simple
                                  --enable: run systemctl --global enable

    --uninstall-as-global-user-service
                                Remove generated global user service

    --uninstall-as-service      Remove generated service

    --install-as-gui-startup[=user|global]
                                Create a .desktop autostart item
                                  user defaults to current user's ~/.config/autostart
                                  global creates it in /etc/xdg/autostart
                                  --user=<user> targets a specific user
                                  --apprunargs=<args> adds arguments before the bundle
                                  --runargs-start=<args> adds app arguments after the bundle
                                  --apprunarg=<arg>, --runarg=<arg> may be repeated
                                  --start launches the generated Exec immediately

    --uninstall-as-gui-startup[=user|global]
                                Remove generated .desktop autostart item

Other:
    --help, -h                  Print this help

Examples:
    apprun3 my-app.apprunx                          Run bundle
    apprun3 my-app.apprunx --verbose --port 8080    Pass args to app
    apprun3 --id my-app.apprunx                     Print bundle ID
    apprun3 --info=name,version my-app.apprunx      Print name and version
    apprun3 --prepare my-app.apprunx                Prepare only
    apprun3 --portable my-app.apprunx               Create Box and mount next to bundle
    apprun3 --portable=box --inherit=venv my-app.apprunx
package.error.entry_missing: no entry point found (requires meta.json entry_point, main.py, main.jar, main.sh, or executable main)
package.error.python_version_type: python_version in meta.json must be a string.
package.arg.prefer:
select compression mode
  speed    - lz4, fast and larger (development/testing)
  balanced - zstd, speed/size balance (default)
  size     - xz, best compression and slower (distribution)
argparse.help: show this help message and exit
